title: carex gracilis subsp. tricostata
intro: Carex gracilis subsp. tricostata, also known as Slender Sedge, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Carex gracilis subsp. tricostata include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
